assessment-update-online.label: Open Assessment uploads (CSV)
assessment-update-online.observe: Tabbed Internship, Jobs, Drive, Projects — export CSV per tab.

assessment-update-online.label: Open Assessment Update Online
assessment-update-online.observe: Inline editable hiring_result rows per application.

assessment-update-online.label: Edit hiring_result inline — manual
assessment-update-online.observe: Change round values; Save changes shows dirty row count.

assessment-update-online.label: Submit results when complete — manual
assessment-update-online.observe: Submit locks further CSV and online edits for that context.

assessment-update-online.label: Open Hiring Results Dashboard
assessment-update-online.observe: Read-only summary of submitted assessment outcomes.

assessment-update-online.label: College opens Hiring Assessment
assessment-update-online.observe: Read-only mirror of employer submitted results.

assessment-update-online.label: Navigate to college Hiring Assessment
assessment-update-online.observe: Same outcomes visible to college TPO.

full-time-job.label: Log in as employer
full-time-job.observe: Employer hub ready to publish a full-time job.

full-time-job.label: Open Jobs and Programs
full-time-job.observe: Job posting list and create form.

full-time-job.label: Publish full_time job — manual
full-time-job.observe: Set campus visibility; publish with GT- marker title if testing linkage.

full-time-job.label: College admin logs in
full-time-job.observe: Approve job on Internships and Programs or Jobs list.

full-time-job.label: Open college Internships and Programs
full-time-job.observe: Pending job or internship row for employer posting.

full-time-job.label: Student browses Jobs
full-time-job.observe: Eligible full-time job visible after approval.

full-time-job.label: Employer reviews Applications for Jobs
full-time-job.observe: Pipeline shows student application; update status or record offer.

full-time-job.label: Open Applications
full-time-job.observe: Filter Jobs tab for new applicant.

employer-registration.label: Open Sign In page
employer-registration.observe: Registration path for new employer — manual account creation.

employer-registration.label: Create employer account — manual
employer-registration.observe: Fill company and admin details; verify email from inbox (context email_verification).

employer-registration.label: Open Email delivery logs
employer-registration.observe: Search registrant login email; context registration_approved or email_verification.

password-reset.label: Open Forgot password
password-reset.observe: Enter login email; same success message for unknown emails (no enumeration).

password-reset.label: Submit reset request — manual
password-reset.observe: Check inbox for password_reset context mail (1-hour link).

password-reset.label: Complete reset on link — manual
password-reset.observe: Choose new password; sign in with updated credentials.

bulk-student-import.label: Open Students list
bulk-student-import.observe: Bulk upload control on Students screen.

bulk-student-import.label: Upload student CSV — manual
bulk-student-import.observe: student_welcome emails sent; college_student_bulk_import summary to admin.

bulk-student-import.label: New student signs in — manual
bulk-student-import.observe: Use temp password from welcome mail; complete profile.

bulk-student-import.label: College verifies student — manual
bulk-student-import.observe: Verify student on Students list unlocks placement features.

sponsorship-receipt.label: Open Sponsorships
sponsorship-receipt.observe: Record donation and send receipt to sponsor email.

sponsorship-receipt.label: Super admin opens Email logs
sponsorship-receipt.observe: Search sponsor email or sponsorship context.

sponsorship-receipt.label: Navigate to Email delivery logs
sponsorship-receipt.observe: Receipt row with recipient_login_email audit trail.

interview-slot-notify.label: Employer logs in
interview-slot-notify.observe: Campus partnership must be approved for target college.

interview-slot-notify.label: Open Interview Scheduling
interview-slot-notify.observe: Link slot to job, internship, or drive opening.

interview-slot-notify.label: Student opens My Interviews
interview-slot-notify.observe: Scheduled slot with date, mode, venue.

interview-slot-notify.label: Navigate to My Interviews
interview-slot-notify.observe: Alert and interview row match employer notification.

interview-slot-notify.label: Email logs — employer_interview_slot
interview-slot-notify.observe: Filter by context or student login email.

interview-slot-notify.label: Open Email delivery logs
interview-slot-notify.observe: Sent rows with recipient audit fields.

email-delivery-audit.label: Trigger selection email — manual prerequisite
email-delivery-audit.observe: Run internship publish-hire first, or Select applicant (student_selection context).

email-delivery-audit.label: Open Email delivery logs
email-delivery-audit.observe: Search recipient login email — survives deleted QA accounts.

email-delivery-audit.label: Review row detail — manual
email-delivery-audit.observe: Original, after communication routing, final SMTP; context and recipient_login_email.

communication-email-routing.label: Super admin opens Email logs
communication-email-routing.observe: Compare original_to vs after_communication_to vs resolved_to.

communication-email-routing.label: Navigate to Email delivery logs
communication-email-routing.observe: recipient_login_email always stores login address even when mail routes to communication_email.

communication-email-routing.label: Search known student login — manual
communication-email-routing.observe: arjun.verma@iitm.edu or test user; trace three-step routing trail.

session-ads-toggle.label: Super admin logs in
session-ads-toggle.observe: Platform Settings controls session ad banner.

session-ads-toggle.label: Open Platform Settings
session-ads-toggle.observe: Show sponsored banner checkbox — default off.

session-ads-toggle.label: Toggle sponsored banner — manual
session-ads-toggle.observe: Save; refresh student dashboard to see SessionAdBanner appear or disappear.

session-ads-toggle.label: Student dashboard check
session-ads-toggle.observe: Banner visibility matches platform setting after refresh.

audit-report-export.label: College admin logs in
audit-report-export.observe: Audit Reports export with emailed download link.

audit-report-export.label: Open Audit Reports
audit-report-export.observe: Pick date range and delivery email.

audit-report-export.label: Export CSV with email — manual
audit-report-export.observe: audit_report_export context; time-limited download link in inbox.

audit-report-export.label: Verify in Email logs
audit-report-export.observe: Export notification row with acting user.

login-support-feedback.label: Open Login page
login-support-feedback.observe: Login support contact form for pre-login help.

login-support-feedback.label: Submit login support message — manual
login-support-feedback.observe: login_support context mail to platform inbox with replyTo user email.

login-support-feedback.label: Student opens Feedback
login-support-feedback.observe: Submit feedback thread as any role.

login-support-feedback.label: Super admin replies on Feedback inbox
login-support-feedback.observe: feedback_reply email and in-app alert to submitter.

login-support-feedback.label: Open Feedback inbox
login-support-feedback.observe: Post reply — manual step during recording.

data-export-notice.label: Student logs in
data-export-notice.observe: Personal data export from My data export.

data-export-notice.label: Open My data export
data-export-notice.observe: Download CSV; user_data_export notice email sent.

data-export-notice.label: Run export — manual
data-export-notice.observe: Browser download plus email log with recipientUserId.

data-export-notice.label: Open Email delivery logs
data-export-notice.observe: Acting user equals recipient for self-export.

guest-engagement.label: Employer logs in
guest-engagement.observe: Campus guest needs and confirmation emails.

guest-engagement.label: Verify Email logs
guest-engagement.observe: Guest original address and employer as acting user.

guest-engagement.label: Open Email delivery logs
guest-engagement.observe: Search guest email or guest_confirmation context.

internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.label: Prerequisite — selected intern on record
internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.observe: Requires at least one internship application in Selected or In progress. If lists are empty, run qa/runners/batch/run_internship_apply_auto_voice.bat or the full internship E2E through Select first.

internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.label: College assigns campus guide for the intern
internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.observe: Programs and Drives → Internship guides. Find the selected student. Click Assign guide, enter faculty contact details and notes, then save.

internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.label: Open Internship guides
internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.observe: Cards list selected and in-progress interns on your campus.

internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.label: Assign campus guide — manual
internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.observe: Enter guide name, department, email, and notes for the student.

internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.label: Open Internship supervisors
internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.observe: Selected and in-progress interns for your company.

internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.label: Assign company supervisor — manual
internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.observe: Enter supervisor name, team, email, phone, and notes for the intern.

internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.label: Open Internship Progress Reviews
internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.observe: Employer feedback table; Add or Edit on a selected intern row.

internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.label: Submit employer internship progress review — manual
internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.observe: Optional star rating plus at least ten characters of feedback text.

internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.label: Student opens Internship Progress Reviews
internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.observe: Campus guide and company supervisor visible when assigned. Submit student feedback below.

internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.label: Navigate to Internship Progress Reviews
internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.observe: Selected internship card with guide, supervisor, and feedback form.

internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.label: Submit student internship progress review — manual
internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.observe: Star rating optional; feedback text at least ten characters.

internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.label: College reviews internship progress review
internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.observe: Read-only table; Export CSV when rows exist.

internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.label: Open Internship Progress Reviews
internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.observe: Student and employer feedback columns for submitted rows.

internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.label: Confirm supervisor on Internship guides
internship-guides-feedback-supervisors.observe: Same intern card shows campus guide and company supervisor read-only.
